title: Automate Your Business with AI
subtitle: Eliminate repetitive tasks and reclaim hours every week using AI automation

modules.title: Automation Fundamentals
lessons: What business automation actually means
Identifying tasks worth automating in your business
The automation ROI mindset: time vs. setup cost
Overview of top tools: Zapier, Make, n8n
Connecting apps without code using triggers and actions
modules.mini_task: List 5 repetitive tasks in your business that could be automated

modules.title: Email and Communication Automation
lessons: Automating email responses with AI drafts
Setting up AI-powered email categorisation
Creating follow-up sequences with AI-generated content
Slack and Teams notifications triggered by business events
Building an AI inbox assistant
modules.mini_task: Set up an automated AI email reply draft in Gmail using Make or Zapier

modules.title: Document and Data Automation
lessons: Auto-generating reports from spreadsheet data
AI-summarised meeting notes from transcripts
Automating invoice generation with AI
Extracting data from PDFs and forms automatically
Syncing data between tools with no code
modules.mini_task: Create an automated workflow that generates a summary from a form submission

modules.title: Customer and Sales Automation
lessons: AI chatbot for customer support on your website
Lead qualification automation with AI scoring
Automated CRM updates from email or chat
Scheduling and booking automation
Personalised AI follow-up messages at scale
modules.mini_task: Set up a basic AI chatbot or lead capture form with an automated response

modules.title: Build Your Automation Stack
lessons: Designing your full automation workflow map
Chaining multiple automations together
Testing and debugging common automation errors
Monitoring automation health and failure alerts
Documenting your automations for your team
modules.mini_task: Draw and describe your business automation map with at least 3 connected flows

final_project: Build and document a complete business automation system that saves at least 3 hours per week, covering email, data, and customer communication.
